prompt: I want to validate a startup idea. It's a Chrome extension that uses AI to summarize and prioritize Slack messages for remote workers. I've already done some customer interviews - 23 out of 30 people said they'd pay for it. I don't have a technical background but I can invest about $20k. I want to know if this is worth pursuing or if I should move on.

assertions.text: References the 23/30 customer interview data and analyzes its reliability
Identifies Slack's native AI features as a competitive threat
Flags risks of non-technical solo founder with limited budget
Provides honest go/no-go assessment rather than unconditional encouragement
Creates brief.md and PROGRESS.md in proper directory structure
